name: Multi-factor authentication
description: Require users to verify sign-ins with more than one factor.
notes: Advanced conditional MFA scenarios normally depend on Conditional Access.

name: Conditional Access
description: Control access based on user, device, location, app, and risk signals.
notes: Requires policy design and testing before enforcement.

name: Privileged Identity Management
description: Just-in-time privileged role activation and approval workflows.
notes: Requires administrative onboarding and role governance.

name: Intune device enrollment
description: Enroll Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android devices for management.
notes: Requires tenant configuration and supported platform enrollment settings.

name: Defender for Endpoint Plan 2
description: Endpoint detection and response, advanced hunting, and security operations features.
notes: Requires onboarding endpoints to the Defender portal.

name: Safe Links
description: Protect users from malicious URLs in email and collaboration workloads.
notes: Policies must be configured after license assignment.

name: Data Loss Prevention
description: Detect and protect sensitive information across Microsoft 365 locations.
notes: Coverage differs by workload, location, endpoint, and advanced classifiers.

name: Teams meetings
notes: Regional Teams packaging changes may affect availability.

name: Teams Premium intelligent recap
description: AI-generated meeting recap capabilities in Teams Premium.
notes: Availability can depend on meeting settings and region.

name: Copilot for Microsoft 365
description: Microsoft 365 Copilot across eligible apps and services.
notes: Copilot eligibility and prerequisites change frequently; verify against current Microsoft Learn.

name: Desktop Office apps
description: Install Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and other desktop apps.
notes: Shared computer activation and RDS/AVD scenarios need separate validation.
